items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 112.2 mph at a -6.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the San Diego Padres, KC 7, SD 6. Seth Lugo led the night, working 6.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 3 strikeouts and 2 walks. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 112.2 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Padres Recap
